title: Huawei S220S-24T4J Gigabit switch, 4x 2.5G SFP
description: Huawei S220S-24T4J is a manageable L2 switch equipped with 24x 1Gbit Ethernet and 4x 2.5G SFP ports . It supports all common L2 functions, along with extensive management options, including management through the Huawei eKit App for cloud control. The switch also enables one-click automatic updates via the Huawei Online Upgrade Platform (HOUP) The Huawei eKitEngine S220S series switches are L2 GE/10GE switches designed for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). Advanced features, high reliability, comprehensive device management options, rack-mount capability, built-in 230V AC power supply, and fanless design (only non-PoE models) make them suitable for a wide range of installation scenarios Device 230V AC Power Cable Ground Cable Rack mounts (4) Screws (4) Self-Adhesive Rubber Pads
